untranslatable_reason: Hilbert Transform indicator is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal requires peak/trough detection via Hilbert Transform, which cannot be replicated using only the available indicators (Moving Averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume/Vol, and Price-based metrics). A technical implementation using Hilbert Transform would be needed.
translation_notes: Signal references 'Hilbert Transform indicator' which is a specialized cycle analysis tool not available in the permitted indicator set. The detrending_method parameter (52-period average) and cycle_period are also not translatable to standard indicators. To implement this strategy, the backtest engine would need native Hilbert Transform support.
